\tzpentry{ID5754}{Quantum Gyromagnetic Coupling Constant Scaling Law}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5754 introduces Quantum Gyromagnetic Coupling Constant Scaling Law as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \alpha_{gyro} &= \frac{g\mu_B L_{gyro}}{\hbar\mu_{eff}} \sim 10^{-3} - 10^{-2} \\ \alpha_{tunnel} &= \exp(-S_0/\hbar) \sim 10^{-5} - 10^{-2} \\ \alpha_{photon} &= \frac{e^2\omega_{light}}{\epsilon_0 c^3 \mu_{eff}B} \sim 10^{-6} - 10^{-4} \\ \alpha_{FD} &= \left(\frac{\omega R}{c}\right)^2 \sim 10^{-16} - 10^{-12} \end{align}
